title: AI Developer – Work-Study Program
description: One-year work-study program at Genial, a startup building specialized AI agents for businesses. Designed and deployed AI agents for clients, managed RAG pipelines with context engineering and multi-agent orchestration, developed MCP servers and tools for agents, and handled iterative client feedback loops.
description_en: One-year work-study program at Genial, a startup building specialized AI agents for businesses. Designed and deployed AI agents for clients, managed RAG pipelines with context engineering and multi-agent orchestration, developed MCP servers and tools for agents, and handled iterative client feedback loops.
description_fr: Alternance d'un an chez Genial, startup spécialisée dans la création d'agents IA pour les entreprises. Conception et déploiement d'agents IA clients, gestion de pipelines RAG avec context engineering et orchestration multi-agents, développement de serveurs MCP et de tools pour les agents, et gestion itérative des retours clients.

title: AI Agent Builder – Freelance
description: One-month freelance mission at Genial as an AI developer. Built and maintained specialized AI agents, set up and managed a sole proprietorship. First professional experience with autonomous project ownership.
description_en: One-month freelance mission at Genial as an AI developer. Built and maintained specialized AI agents, set up and managed a sole proprietorship. First professional experience with autonomous project ownership.
description_fr: Mission freelance d'un mois chez Genial en tant que développeur IA. Création et maintenance d'agents IA spécialisés, création et gestion d'une auto-entreprise. Première expérience professionnelle avec une gestion autonome de projets.

title: Machine Learning Research Intern
description: Ten-week research internship at Bekki Lab, Ochanomizu University (Tokyo). Reproduced the GPT-2 architecture in Haskell using the Hasktorch library, exploring functional programming applied to deep learning. Worked in an NLP and machine learning research environment.
description_en: Ten-week research internship at Bekki Lab, Ochanomizu University (Tokyo). Reproduced the GPT-2 architecture in Haskell using the Hasktorch library, exploring functional programming applied to deep learning. Worked in an NLP and machine learning research environment.
description_fr: Stage de recherche de dix semaines au Bekki Lab, Université d'Ochanomizu (Tokyo). Reproduction de l'architecture GPT-2 en Haskell avec la bibliothèque Hasktorch, exploration de la programmation fonctionnelle appliquée au deep learning. Travail dans un environnement de recherche en NLP et machine learning.

title: Bachelor of Computer Science
description: Bachelor of Computer Science (International track) at IUT de Gradignan, University of Bordeaux. Coursework in software engineering, databases, web development, system administration, artificial intelligence, and mathematics.
description_en: Bachelor of Computer Science (International track) at IUT de Gradignan, University of Bordeaux. Coursework in software engineering, databases, web development, system administration, artificial intelligence, and mathematics.
description_fr: BUT Informatique (parcours international) à l'IUT de Gradignan, Université de Bordeaux. Enseignements en génie logiciel, bases de données, développement web, administration système, intelligence artificielle et mathématiques.
